textByHash.6c57cbc5766b83d956e3f4a1d2d04b89548877ff: You should talk to the lead navigator when you're ready to set sail.
textByHash.9c03a865bcecffb9d123e48fd6bc9db5cef01f03: I think the lucky charm sounds like a good idea...
textByHash.2b355fca98bf172adaa3cbc019c9a0a13993e763: Don't forget the lucky charm from the odd old man up in Paterdomus!
textByHash.0485559fff942f55e5509eb852aeec5391184736: Hey, have you managed to get me that lucky charm?
textByHash.9fa8f66a705c3cdd72fe8497ae5937da81036ff4: The old man up in Paterdomus collects those sort of things, I'd see if he's going anything he's willing to give up.
textByHash.4a12908b54ef78eacdb2685d7620065c3c78d10e: Thanks for getting me the lucky charm. I'm feeling a lot better about the voyage already.
textByHash.1d46dddb3a2d8ceafb12549e2e2e266485d3431d: What did your potion do to the crew?!
textByHash.afebbba196804b7c7669672a0844df3668e29861: But then who's going to get us to the island?
textByHash.631a15ee3c3a077392eae01a60a7c5dda2789826: Yes, a JUNIOR navigator! I've never navigated open waters like this!
textByHash.7164132718d8393f439f1ac149177acacfa92529: But this barge is highly specialised! It's the only one of its kind and it took years for the lead navigator to learn how to sail it!
textByHash.8c6087baec9d540898c820c2c3ce1298d9527ede: You'll need to operate the barge controls, I'll let you know if we're headed in the right direction.
textByHash.c745e7d83bfe0e0703843bf723e1b8437f25e9b1: You'll have to fight against the winds to keep the bearing North, you can do that by steering the barge.
textByHash.07e1d7867e21d0ddbbfbf079a6da4edc4fc50573: You can increase or decrease our speed by adjusting the sails. You might find keeping the bearing North easier at slower speeds, but it will take longer to reach the island.
textByHash.094863d00b6d18ebef4b6dfaac2a18508d7208af: If we're headed in the wrong direction for too long I'll take us back to the digsite. Let me know if you want me to go back over these instructions at any point.
textByHash.164d8d3d8e9d61388a698dd2bcd599fa8c054cb7: We were completely off course. Talk to the lead navigator to try again.
textByHash.8d79caaeb17d3bb4d8f323b6d70343ec54b201f7: Good work, , you got us here in one piece!
textByHash.646203650ee4d15763e134b8d97272bc376f9d21: I suppose you'll want to start exploring the island as soon as possible.
textByHash.4caaf73a548d94f24d038cc6e5948c55d7a62e73: Here, take this journal so you can keep track of your discoveries. Base camp is being set up on shore, let me know if you'd like to head there.
textByHash.e3772b3b865b46bda32de7b5291257d9f34815e6: Hello, you should probably talk to the lead navigator, he's calling the shots around here.
textByHash.196f8e8be605ba9b66893d3ee116d0a30c11fd52: You should probably talk to the lead navigator, he's calling the shots around here.
textByHash.094d826636fd1e42573f56a22f77e333db87deee: Hey, , would you like me to row you to shore?
